Your Book, Your Vision

Complete creative control over every text and every image.

Unlike other personalized book services, MagicalStory gives you full control. Edit any text, reshape any illustration, refine any character — until your book is exactly how you imagined it.

Edit Every Word

Every page of text is fully editable. Change names, rewrite sentences, adjust the story to fit your family perfectly. The AI writes the first draft — you make it yours.

  • ✓Click on any text to edit it directly
  • ✓Rewrite entire paragraphs or fix individual words
  • ✓Adjust reading level for your child's age

Shape Every Image

Don't like how a scene looks? Describe what you want changed, and a new illustration is generated in seconds. Change the setting, adjust character positions, or try a completely different scene.

  • ✓Describe changes in your own words — "make the sky bluer" or "add a rainbow"
  • ✓Reimagine entire scenes with a new description
  • ✓Try different art styles on the same scene

Consistent Characters

Upload a photo once, and your child appears consistently throughout the book. If a character doesn't look quite right on one page, fix just that page without affecting the rest.

  • ✓AI maintains character appearance across all pages
  • ✓Fix individual characters on specific pages
  • ✓Add up to 10 family members as characters

170+ Themes

From pirate adventures to stories about the first day of school. Each theme is thoughtfully designed with age-appropriate language and engaging plots.

  • ✓Adventure, fantasy, birthday, bedtime stories
  • ✓Life challenges: new sibling, dentist visit, overcoming fears
  • ✓Local stories: Swiss cities, landmarks, and traditions

8 Art Styles

Choose from Pixar-style 3D, watercolor, comic, anime, realistic, and more. Every style is applied consistently across all pages.

Try it free — your first story costs nothing

Upload a photo, pick a theme, and see your personalized book in under 3 minutes. No account needed.

Create Your Story
